entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Give me a harder version after I try."
"Help me prepare for finals"
"Keep it beginner friendly."
"Make a JEE revision schedule"
"Plan 2 weeks for biology"
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "ከፈተናዬ፣ ፕሮጀክቴ ወይም ዕለታዊ ሕይወቴ ምሳሌዎችን ተጠቀም።"

entries.source: AI prompts
Ask for a tiny first task.
End with a recap you write yourself.
Exam Prep Planner prompts and study loop
entries.value: የExam Prep Planner ጥያቄ መነሻዎች እና የጥናት ዑደት

entries.source: For Exam Prep Planner, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: ለExam Prep Planner፣ ጠቃሚ የልምምድ ዑደት ይህ ነው፦

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: ለዚህ ሁነታ ሥራው ቀላል ነው፦ ሲላበስዎን፣ የፈተና ቀንዎን፣ ጊዜዎን እና ደካማ ቦታዎችዎን ወደ ተግባራዊ የጥናት እቅድ ይቀይሩ።

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: ጥሩ ጥያቄ መነሻዎች ብዙ ጊዜ ሦስት ነገሮችን ያካትታሉ፦ የትምህርት ርዕሱን፣ የአሁኑን ደረጃዎን እና የሚፈልጉትን የእገዛ ዓይነት። ፍጹም ቃላት አያስፈልጉዎትም። ክፍለ ጊዜው እንዲጀምር በቂ አውድ ብቻ ያስፈልግዎታል።

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: መልሱ በጣም ሰፊ ከመሰለ፣ ያጥብቁት። አንድ ምሳሌ፣ አንድ የተሳሳተ ግንዛቤ፣ አንድ የማረጋገጫ ጥያቄ ወይም አንድ ቀጣይ ደረጃ ይጠይቁ። በጣም ቀላል ከመሰለ፣ ፈተና ይጠይቁ። በጣም ከባድ ከመሰለ፣ ከሚያውቁት ነገር የሚጀምር ድልድይ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Planning
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Exam Prep Planner on inspir.
entries.value: በinspir ላይ Exam Prep Planner ጠቃሚ የመማር ውጤት እንዲሰጥ የፕሮምፕት ሐሳቦች እና ሊደገም የሚችል የጥናት ዑደት።

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: የኤአይ መልስ ማንበብ መማር አይደለም። ከመጀመሪያው መልስ በኋላ፣ ሁነታው ከሐሳቡ ጋር አንድ ነገር እንዲያደርጉ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: እርግጠኛ ባልሆነው ክፍል ላይ ግብረመልስ ይጠይቁ።

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: ያ የመጨረሻ ማጠቃለያ አስፈላጊ ነው። ሐሳቡን መልሰው ሲያብራሩ፣ ምን ጠንካራ እንደሆነ እና ምን አሁንም ከAI የተዋሰ እንደሆነ ይገልጣሉ።

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: ምርጥ የመማር ክፍለ-ጊዜዎች ሊስተካከሉ የሚችሉ ናቸው። እቅድ አውጪው ደካማ አካባቢዎችን ቅድሚያ ይሰጣል፣ የክለሳ ዑደቶችን ያክላል እና ለተሳቱ ቀናት fallback plans ይፈጥራል።

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Exam Prep Planner is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: ከExam Prep Planner ጠቃሚ ውጤት ለማግኘት ፈጣኑ መንገድ ለኤአይው ርዕስ ብቻ ሳይሆን የመማር ሥራ መስጠት ነው። ርዕስ የሚስብዎትን ይናገራል፤ የመማር ሥራ ደግሞ ምን ዓይነት እርዳታ እንደሚፈልጉ ይናገራል።

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: ከዚያ ክፍለ-ጊዜውን የበለጠ ግላዊ የሚያደርግ ገደብ ያክሉ፦

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Exam Prep Planner when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Speaking Practice. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Exam Prep Planner ለዚህ ሥራ ትክክለኛው ሁነታ ሲሆን ይጠቀሙበት። ተዛማጅ መንገድ ከፈለጉ፣ Speaking Practiceን ይሞክሩ። እንዲሁም ስለ ጥናት ዘዴዎች፣ Socratic መማር፣ ፍላሽካርዶች፣ ሚና ጨዋታ እና ንቁ ማስታወስ የኤአይ መማር ብሎግን ማሰስ ይችላሉ።
